_comment: Edit MACs to match your boards (run.py heatmap prints unknown ones on first packet) and (x_m, y_m) to match your room. Coordinates in meters; origin doesn't matter — only relative positions. 'txs' is a list; for a single transmitter use a one-element list. 'room' may be either width_m/height_m or a 'polygon' of [x,y] pairs.
